mapper.select: SELECT A.ID, A.CATE_CD, A.ATTR_SEQ, A.ATTR_NM, A.ATTR_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS ATTR_TYP_NM, A.OPTION_VALS, A.REQUIRED_YN, A.SORT_NO, A.USE_YN FROM IT_CATE_ATTR A LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='ATTR_TYP' AND T.CD=A.ATTR_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' WHERE A.CATE_CD=#{cateCd} AND A.DEL_YN='N' ORDER BY A.SORT_NO, A.ATTR_SEQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO IT_CATE_ATTR (CATE_CD, ATTR_SEQ, ATTR_NM, ATTR_TYP, OPTION_VALS, REQUIRED_YN, SORT_NO, USE_YN, REG_ID) VALUES (#{cateCd}, #{attrSeq}, #{attrNm}, NVL(#{attrTyp},'TEXT'), #{optionVals}, NVL(#{requiredYn},'N'), NVL(#{sortNo},1), NVL(#{useYn},'Y'), 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select: SELECT ATTR_NM, ATTR_VAL FROM IT_ITEM_ATTR WHERE ITEM_ID=#{itemId} ORDER BY ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO IT_ITEM_ATTR (ITEM_ID, ATTR_NM, ATTR_VAL, REG_ID) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{attrNm}, #{attrVal}, 'SYSTEM')
